text_raw: Ah, if it isn't one of the vaunted Greymanes.
text_clean: Ah, if it isn't one of the vaunted Greymanes.

text_raw: Took you long enough.
text_clean: Took you long enough.

text_raw: White Crow? Ah... you mean the offering.
text_clean: White Crow? Ah... you mean the offering.

text_raw: On her way to the altar as we speak.
text_clean: On her way to the altar as we speak.

text_raw: I've long wondered why Mother ever cared for the likes of you.
text_clean: I've long wondered why Mother ever cared for the likes of you.

text_raw: Let's find out, shall we?
text_clean: Let's find out, shall we?

text_raw: Is this the best you've got?
text_clean: Is this the best you've got?

text_raw: Seems you have no will to fight! What an utter disappointment!
text_clean: Seems you have no will to fight! What an utter disappointment!

text_raw: If this is the true extent of a Greymane, then I've no more business here.
text_clean: If this is the true extent of a Greymane, then I've no more business here.

text_raw: Why would Mother bother with such filth...
text_clean: Why would Mother bother with such filth...

text_raw: Kill him.
text_clean: Kill him.

text_raw: Where is White Crow?
text_clean: Where is White Crow?

text_raw: Stop right there!
text_clean: Stop right there!

text_raw: Greymane.
text_clean: Greymane.

text_raw: I sense White Crow is no longer in Hernand. They're heading to Demeniss.
text_clean: I sense White Crow is no longer in Hernand. They're heading to Demeniss.

text_raw: We must find her—before it's too late.
text_clean: We must find her—before it's too late.

text_raw: Where has he vanished to?
text_clean: Where has he vanished to?

text_raw: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Alustin#Alustin}?
text_clean: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Alustin#Alustin}?

text_raw: It's you...
text_clean: It's you...

text_raw: Urgh...
text_clean: Urgh...

text_raw: White Crow has been taken...
text_clean: White Crow has been taken...

text_raw: My wounds matter not... You must find her quickly.
text_clean: My wounds matter not... You must find her quickly.

text_raw: White Crow must never fall into her hands... No matter what.
text_clean: White Crow must never fall into her hands... No matter what.

text_raw: Go after him, find White Crow...
text_clean: Go after him, find White Crow...

text_raw: Follow him, the Crow... And stop the Black Witch.
text_clean: Follow him, the Crow... And stop the Black Witch.

text_raw: One who covets White Crow's power. If she succeeds in claiming it...
text_clean: One who covets White Crow's power. If she succeeds in claiming it...

text_raw: You must do whatever it takes...
text_clean: You must do whatever it takes...

text_raw: Alustin! Stay with me!
text_clean: Alustin! Stay with me!

text_raw: What happened?
text_clean: What happened?

text_raw: What do you mean? Who did this to you?
text_clean: What do you mean? Who did this to you?

text_raw: Alustin!
text_clean: Alustin!

text_raw: Who is that?
text_clean: Who is that?

text_raw: You don't know your place...
text_clean: You don't know your place...

text_raw: Came all this way to meet your death, did you?
text_clean: Came all this way to meet your death, did you?

text_raw: Your carcass isn't worth claiming. I'll leave it for my crows!
text_clean: Your carcass isn't worth claiming. I'll leave it for my crows!

text_raw: Let me remind you of your weakness... Again!
text_clean: Let me remind you of your weakness... Again!

text_raw: Don't get cocky, Greymane!
text_clean: Don't get cocky, Greymane!

text_raw: Kill him!
text_clean: Kill him!

text_raw: Is that all the fight you have in you?
text_clean: Is that all the fight you have in you?

text_raw: You think this pathetic display is worthy of Mother's favor?
text_clean: You think this pathetic display is worthy of Mother's favor?

text_raw: Your life is hardly worth the effort of taking.
text_clean: Your life is hardly worth the effort of taking.

text_raw: Come and find me. Your doom awaits.
text_clean: Come and find me. Your doom awaits.

text_raw: Didn't expect him to go this far.
text_clean: Didn't expect him to go this far.

text_raw: Crows...
text_clean: Crows...

text_raw: Should I be feeling overpowered yet?
text_clean: Should I be feeling overpowered yet?

text_raw: Help me!
text_clean: Help me!

text_raw: Oh, mighty Solumen, watch over your servant...
text_clean: Oh, mighty Solumen, watch over your servant...

text_raw: They must be stopped.
text_clean: They must be stopped.

text_raw: Die, foul beast!
text_clean: Die, foul beast!

text_raw: Oh, mighty Solumen!
text_clean: Oh, mighty Solumen!

text_raw: It's the sanctuary we have stood watch over for generations.
text_clean: It's the sanctuary we have stood watch over for generations.

text_raw: Not simply because it was sacred. There's more to it.
text_clean: Not simply because it was sacred. There's more to it.

text_raw: It is said that the gate leads to a world beyond our own.
text_clean: It is said that the gate leads to a world beyond our own.

text_raw: They were evil incarnate.
text_clean: They were evil incarnate.

text_raw: They sought the secret to open Heaven's Gate,
text_clean: They sought the secret to open Heaven's Gate,

text_raw: and slaughtered the faithful who held their tongues.
text_clean: and slaughtered the faithful who held their tongues.

text_raw: In the cellar lies a relic that can open Heaven's Gate.
text_clean: In the cellar lies a relic that can open Heaven's Gate.

text_raw: Most were murdered. A lucky few were taken away. It was hell itself.
text_clean: Most were murdered. A lucky few were taken away. It was hell itself.

text_raw: Here. Take the key and stop those monsters.
text_clean: Here. Take the key and stop those monsters.

text_raw: They said it was all for the "Mother"...
text_clean: They said it was all for the "Mother"...

text_raw: But now those wicked souls have passed through!
text_clean: But now those wicked souls have passed through!

text_raw: Even after all that bloodshed... those fiends forced open Heaven's Gate.
text_clean: Even after all that bloodshed... those fiends forced open Heaven's Gate.

text_raw: Calm yourself!
text_clean: Calm yourself!

text_raw: I'm looking for a man, clad in black feathers.
text_clean: I'm looking for a man, clad in black feathers.

text_raw: I was pursuing him, but lost the trail at the altar.
text_clean: I was pursuing him, but lost the trail at the altar.

text_raw: Heaven's Gate?
text_clean: Heaven's Gate?

text_raw: So this was the showdown he sought...
text_clean: So this was the showdown he sought...

text_raw: That's what befell all those people?
text_clean: That's what befell all those people?

text_raw: Find somewhere safe and stay hidden.
text_clean: Find somewhere safe and stay hidden.

text_raw: Madmen.
text_clean: Madmen.

text_raw: You know something about this?
text_clean: You know something about this?

text_raw: Who are they?
text_clean: Who are they?

text_raw: What in Solumen's name is going on here?
text_clean: What in Solumen's name is going on here?

text_raw: We can't handle this on our own.
text_clean: We can't handle this on our own.

text_raw: Greymane, sir! Trouble... grave trouble.
text_clean: Greymane, sir! Trouble... grave trouble.

text_raw: Ghosts! It was if we were fighting ghosts!
text_clean: Ghosts! It was if we were fighting ghosts!

text_raw: We've got unknown intruders...
text_clean: We've got unknown intruders...

text_raw: running rampant in the keep!
text_clean: running rampant in the keep!

text_raw: I scarce know how to describe it...
text_clean: I scarce know how to describe it...

text_raw: None... just crow feathers strewn at the scene.
text_clean: None... just crow feathers strewn at the scene.

text_raw: Hey! We've got something!
text_clean: Hey! We've got something!

text_raw: Intruders got past the guard, they've breached the inner keep!
text_clean: Intruders got past the guard, they've breached the inner keep!

text_raw: They might still be lurking around the castle. We should keep an eye out.
text_clean: They might still be lurking around the castle. We should keep an eye out.

text_raw: Solumen save us...
text_clean: Solumen save us...

text_raw: What the hell is going on?
text_clean: What the hell is going on?

text_raw: They were tearing the place apart, as if searching for something...
text_clean: They were tearing the place apart, as if searching for something...

text_raw: Then... suddenly... they vanished!
text_clean: Then... suddenly... they vanished!

text_raw: Any idea who they might be?
text_clean: Any idea who they might be?

text_raw: Hm.
text_clean: Hm.

text_raw: Aye. Struck so fast we couldn't lift a blade.
text_clean: Aye. Struck so fast we couldn't lift a blade.

text_raw: They singled out the priests...
text_clean: They singled out the priests...

text_raw: Hard to call it chance. More likely to be a grudge they bear.
text_clean: Hard to call it chance. More likely to be a grudge they bear.

text_raw: You shouldn't be here.
text_clean: You shouldn't be here.

text_raw: Of course.
text_clean: Of course.

text_raw: Clear off, now! Nothing to see here!
text_clean: Clear off, now! Nothing to see here!

text_raw: Tsk... how dreadful.
text_clean: Tsk... how dreadful.

text_raw: Poor souls... What a pity.
text_clean: Poor souls... What a pity.

text_raw: How could this happen in Solumen's own house of worship...
text_clean: How could this happen in Solumen's own house of worship...

text_raw: Why would this befall our luminous father...
text_clean: Why would this befall our luminous father...

text_raw: Must've earned the god's ire...
text_clean: Must've earned the god's ire...

text_raw: How's one meant to walk the streets after this...
text_clean: How's one meant to walk the streets after this...

text_raw: I heard you were attacked.
text_clean: I heard you were attacked.

text_raw: I'm glad you're unharmed.
text_clean: I'm glad you're unharmed.

text_raw: There are rumors from the Church of West Demeniss.
text_clean: There are rumors from the Church of West Demeniss.

text_raw: They say the Black Witch took a child... twisted him into a crow-shrouded reaper.
text_clean: They say the Black Witch took a child... twisted him into a crow-shrouded reaper.

text_raw: He bore deep hatred for the Church...
text_clean: He bore deep hatred for the Church...

text_raw: but why he's after you, who's no priest, I can't say.
text_clean: but why he's after you, who's no priest, I can't say.

text_raw: Was this the work of the Crows?
text_clean: Was this the work of the Crows?

text_raw: It's alright. I know her.
text_clean: It's alright. I know her.

text_raw: Anything come to mind about those bastards?
text_clean: Anything come to mind about those bastards?

text_raw: What kind of rumors?
text_clean: What kind of rumors?

text_raw: Greymane, does this place please you?
text_clean: Greymane, does this place please you?

text_raw: It shall serve as your grave.
text_clean: It shall serve as your grave.

text_raw: This is my nest.
text_clean: This is my nest.

text_raw: The moment you set foot here, your fate was sealed.
text_clean: The moment you set foot here, your fate was sealed.

text_raw: Bold of you not to flee, Greymane. I'll grant you that much.
text_clean: Bold of you not to flee, Greymane. I'll grant you that much.

text_raw: But now, lay down your arms and accept your fate.
text_clean: But now, lay down your arms and accept your fate.

text_raw: Resist, and you'll only know greater suffering.
text_clean: Resist, and you'll only know greater suffering.

text_raw: Join those damned priests as an offering to the darkness.
text_clean: Join those damned priests as an offering to the darkness.

text_raw: Mother!
text_clean: Mother!

text_raw: She would always go on and on about you, so fondly.
text_clean: She would always go on and on about you, so fondly.

text_raw: In front of me! Her very own son!
text_clean: In front of me! Her very own son!

text_raw: I should be all that she sees.
text_clean: I should be all that she sees.

text_raw: In her eyes, I must remain above all!
text_clean: In her eyes, I must remain above all!

text_raw: "Greymane! Greymane!" Always the bloody Greymane!
text_clean: "Greymane! Greymane!" Always the bloody Greymane!

text_raw: Every day, I dream of tearing her beloved Greymane limb from limb!
text_clean: Every day, I dream of tearing her beloved Greymane limb from limb!

text_raw: Once you're gone...
text_clean: Once you're gone...

text_raw: No one will ever take my place!
text_clean: No one will ever take my place!

text_raw: I'll kill you so the world may know I exist!
text_clean: I'll kill you so the world may know I exist!

text_raw: They'll be fine offerings to Mother...
text_clean: They'll be fine offerings to Mother...

text_raw: Welcome to our nest!
text_clean: Welcome to our nest!

text_raw: As will you.
text_clean: As will you.

text_raw: Why would such a weakling even turn Mother's head?
text_clean: Why would such a weakling even turn Mother's head?

text_raw: Her gaze shall remain fixed on me! Always!
text_clean: Her gaze shall remain fixed on me! Always!

text_raw: Mother has yet to deem me worthy.
text_clean: Mother has yet to deem me worthy.

text_raw: I will dye this nest with your blood!
text_clean: I will dye this nest with your blood!

text_raw: There's nowhere to go but to your grave!
text_clean: There's nowhere to go but to your grave!

text_raw: The light will illuminate your sins, heathens!
text_clean: The light will illuminate your sins, heathens!

text_raw: Ah, Solumen, hear us!
text_clean: Ah, Solumen, hear us!

text_raw: You rescued me from my own twisted shade.
text_clean: You rescued me from my own twisted shade.

text_raw: Thank you... Truly.
text_clean: Thank you... Truly.

text_raw: But... I fear this is not the end.
text_clean: But... I fear this is not the end.

text_raw: Be careful, Greymane.
text_clean: Be careful, Greymane.

text_raw: What is this?
text_clean: What is this?

text_raw: Come out!
text_clean: Come out!

text_raw: Let's end this.
text_clean: Let's end this.

text_raw: We'll see whose grave it'll be.
text_clean: We'll see whose grave it'll be.

text_raw: I've no interest in your story.
text_clean: I've no interest in your story.

text_raw: The grave...
text_clean: The grave...

text_raw: is yours!
text_clean: is yours!

text_raw: Are you alright?
text_clean: Are you alright?
